hypotheses_considered.summary: Use the corrected incumbent entry-relay as the backbone, then open the real inner gateway at anchor9 to a mixed beta and run one exact-return diagonal pair before node10 resumes. This is a genuinely different manifold from the already-pruned corridor / terminal / startup families.

Wrap the corrected incumbent entry-relay with a tiny pre-entry anchor7 corridor conditioner and a tiny anchor12 terminal reclosure, keeping the middle incumbent core untouched. This is the previously held-back split-chain family, now tested directly on the corrected incumbent backbone.

Control family for H1: still use the corrected incumbent entry-relay backbone, but visit both legal diagonals inside one anchor9 butterfly. If H1 needs a fuller mixed-beta sweep, the butterfly should outperform the pair.
Anchor3 mirror-control version of the mixed-beta gateway idea. Kept listed only because the old-basis evidence already made it look substantially weaker than late-gateway insertion.

selected_families: anchor9 gateway diagonal pair on corrected entry backbone
anchor7→12 split bookend chain on corrected entry backbone

rows_sorted.rationale: Split corridor-to-terminal chain around the corrected incumbent entry-relay: anchor7 negative x conditioner plus anchor12 negative y terminal reclosure.
Split corridor-to-terminal chain around the corrected incumbent entry-relay: anchor7 negative x bookend plus anchor12 positive x terminal reclosure.
Anchor9 gateway diagonal pair with 4 s diagonal dwell on top of the corrected incumbent entry-relay backbone.
Dose-up anchor9 gateway diagonal pair on top of the corrected incumbent entry-relay backbone.
Order-control variant for the corrected anchor9 gateway diagonal pair: reverse the outer sweep order while keeping dwell fixed at 4 s.
Dose-down anchor9 gateway diagonal pair on top of the corrected incumbent entry-relay backbone.
Cheap control after H1: same-sign anchor9 diagonal butterfly with 4 s dwell on the corrected incumbent entry-relay backbone.
Dose-up same-sign anchor9 diagonal butterfly control on the corrected incumbent entry-relay backbone.

gateway_pair.rationale: Anchor9 gateway diagonal pair with 4 s diagonal dwell on top of the corrected incumbent entry-relay backbone.

split_bookend_chain.rationale: Split corridor-to-terminal chain around the corrected incumbent entry-relay: anchor7 negative x conditioner plus anchor12 negative y terminal reclosure.

gateway_butterfly_control.rationale: Cheap control after H1: same-sign anchor9 diagonal butterfly with 4 s dwell on the corrected incumbent entry-relay backbone.

best_candidate.rationale: Split corridor-to-terminal chain around the corrected incumbent entry-relay: anchor7 negative x conditioner plus anchor12 negative y terminal reclosure.

bottom_line.statement: The new split bookend chain becomes a new corrected-basis runner-up behind the entry-conditioned relay, while the gateway diagonal pair survives only as a weaker side branch.
